overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through a sunlit pine forest. A horse-drawn wagon passes by on the trail, after which the character continues walking through increasingly dense woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt trail through grassy pine forest

events.description: horse-drawn wagon appears in the distance approaching on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland with pine trees on the horizon

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon with white horses approaching along the trail from ahead

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
dense stand of tall pine trees lining the left side
pine trees and grassy hillside on the right
tall golden grass covering the rolling terrain
snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt trail through open grassland bordered by distant pine forests. A horse-drawn wagon appears ahead on the path, approaching from the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: trail narrowing as wagon passes by

events.description: horse-drawn wagon passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the wagon approaches and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: red wooden wagon with two occupants and two white horses passing by on the right

segments.scene_description: The wagon draws closer and passes by on the right side of the trail. The surrounding landscape becomes more enclosed by trees as the grassy clearings fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail with dappled sunlight

events.description: character raises right hand to touch the brim of their hat while walking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the forested section, briefly touching their hat at one point

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through a denser section of pine forest where the trees loom closer to the trail. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy, and distant mountains remain visible through breaks in the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from open, sunlit grasslands into a dense, enclosed pine forest. It begins with the character walking through wide clearings bordered by distant trees as a horse-drawn wagon approaches from the distance. As the wagon draws closer and passes by on the right, the landscape shifts, with the open fields falling away to be replaced by encroaching woodland. The scene then moves deeper into a thick section of pine forest where the trees loom closer to the path and dappled sunlight filters through the canopy. Finally, the camera continues forward through the heavy foliage, keeping distant mountains visible through occasional breaks in the trees.
